$comment: ignoreCommand: skip a Vercel deploy when a push changed ONLY data/forensics/* — the scan commits those every ~10 min (144/day), which alone blows the daily deploy cap and freezes code deploys too. The site now reads that data LIVE from GitHub raw at request time (api/forensics/livestore.js), so data commits need no deploy; any change OUTSIDE data/forensics still deploys. Vercel: exit 0 = skip build, exit 1 = build.
ignoreCommand: git diff --quiet HEAD^ HEAD -- . ':(exclude)data/forensics' && exit 0 || exit 1
